cloud.title: Architecture
cloud.desc: Event-driven flows, high-availability patterns, and governance tuned for banking and healthtech.

coffee.title: Coffee & Curiosity
coffee.desc: Espresso tinkerer, gamer, and researcher. Often paired with Gaia, the family Newfoundland.

body.one: I'm Fernando Javier Batres Velásquez, a Guatemalan solutions architect with 10+ years building software for banking, healthtech, and enterprise teams.
body.two: I focus on backend and cloud platforms—NestJS, Angular, AWS, Azure—and I lead teams through microservices, event-driven designs, and CI/CD that ships safely.
body.three: Outside work, I'm a barista hobbyist, gamer, and deep researcher who loves exploring with my wife and our Newfoundland dog, Gaia.
body.four: I align architecture with business outcomes, shape engineering culture, and pair mentorship with hands-on delivery.

cv.title: Staff Full Stack Engineer · Solutions Architect · AI-First Engineering
cv.summary:
Staff Engineer and Solutions Architect with 10+ years delivering production-grade systems across web, backend, mobile, and cloud. Specializes in AI-first engineering — integrating LLMs into the SDLC through contract-driven development, automated code generation, and multi-layer validation pipelines.

Proven track record leading cloud modernization across AWS and Azure, standardizing CI/CD at scale, and shaping engineering culture. Active Google Developer, Tech Speaker, and open-source contributor.

ai.label: End-to-end AI-Assisted SDLC Pipeline
ai.sdg19: Full SDLC through AI-assisted workflows. Codex + Kiro + CodeRabbit + Snyk + SonarCloud + AWS CDK. End-to-end production quality via automated enforcement.
ai.pettzi: OpenSpec + OpenAPI contract-first. AI-scaffolded backend, event-driven AWS architecture, Nx monorepo. Repeatable, documented AI-assisted engineering pattern.

pipeline.openapi: The contract that drives everything. Endpoints, schemas, request/response models, and validation rules are defined before a single line of code is written. This becomes the single source of truth for generation, mocking, and testing.
pipeline.codex: AI generates production-ready scaffolding directly from the OpenAPI spec — controllers, services, DTOs, and unit tests. Eliminates boilerplate while preserving architectural intent, cutting initial coding effort by 60–80%.
pipeline.kiro: Validates AI-generated code against the original spec and project requirements. Catches hallucinations, drift, and misaligned behavior before code review, ensuring generated output actually matches what was contracted.
pipeline.coderabbit: AI-powered code review on every PR. Analyzes logic correctness, security risks, and maintainability. Provides inline suggestions and plain-language summaries so reviewers focus on intent, not mechanics.
pipeline.snyk: Snyk detects CVEs in dependencies and blocks vulnerable code from merging. SonarCloud enforces coverage thresholds, code smells, and technical debt budgets on every commit — automated quality gates with no manual overrides.
pipeline.cicd: The final enforcement gate. Pipelines run lint, type checks, tests, security scans, and build validation on every push. Only code that clears every gate reaches production — no exceptions, no manual bypasses.

gtc.b1: Leading cloud modernization and DevOps transformation across multiple teams at one of Guatemala's largest financial institutions

gtc.b5: Introduced AI-assisted development workflows (ChatGPT, Copilot, CodeRabbit) across engineering teams
gtc.b6: Built observability standards with Azure Monitor + Log Analytics, improving incident detection and response
gtc.b7: Authored ADRs and governance frameworks adopted organization-wide; served as technical advisor to leadership
